paper_title: Temporal Representativeness Errors in Paleoclimate Data

methods.description: This method estimates the temporal representativeness (TR) errors when representing long-term climate means by shorter observed time-mean values. It is used to understand the discrepancies that arise when comparing paleoclimate data to model outputs.

steps.description: Define LGM target quantities as estimates of time means over the 4000-year period from 23,000 to 19,000 years ago.
steps.searchable_summary: define LGM target quantities for time means over 4000 years

steps.description: Consider TR errors arising from representing xLGM by an observed 1000-year time-mean value centered on 21 ka.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate TR errors for 1000-year time-mean centered on 21 ka

steps.description: Use the NGRIP 50-year average time series of oxygen isotope ratios (δ18O) to illustrate the procedure.
steps.searchable_summary: use NGRIP δ18O time series for TR error illustration

steps.description: Smooth the NGRIP record with running means of length τx = 4000 and τy = 1000 to yield time series of potential target and observation values.
steps.searchable_summary: smooth NGRIP record with running means of 4000 and 1000 years

steps.description: Calculate the difference θ(t) and its squared difference to estimate the error variance.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate difference and squared difference for error variance

steps.description: Perform wavelet analysis to diagnose variability in the frequency band responsible for TR errors.
steps.searchable_summary: perform wavelet analysis for TR error variability

methods.description: This method explores the interactions between sampling parameters and signal spectra to understand how the spectral character of paleoclimate processes affects TR errors.

steps.description: Consider climate processes with power-law spectra to investigate how errors depend on the spectrum of r(t).
steps.searchable_summary: analyze climate processes with power-law spectra for TR errors

steps.description: Perform numerical integration of Eq. (A13) by global adaptive quadrature.
steps.searchable_summary: perform numerical integration using global adaptive quadrature
